name: Cash to You Bargain Inc
description_short: NYC-based pawn shop offering quick loans, collateral-based lending, and buying/selling of jewelry, watches, coins, and diamonds with emphasis on fair appraisals and transparency.
description_long:
Cash To You Bargain is a pawn shop operation based in New York City that operates under the brand name 'Roman The Buyer.' The company specializes in providing quick access to cash through collateral-based lending and the purchase of high-value personal items. Their business model centers on three primary revenue streams: providing pawn loans against valuable merchandise, purchasing items outright from customers, and reselling pre-owned goods from their inventory.

The company offers pawn services and cash purchases for a focused range of luxury and precious items including gold jewelry, diamonds, watches, and rare coins (both gold and silver). They position themselves around speed and fair valuation, claiming to provide quick appraisals and transparent processes. Their marketing emphasizes a three-step process: obtaining a loan against collateral, selling items directly to the shop, or purchasing pre-owned merchandise from their inventory. The website indicates they handle transactions with stated emphasis on confidentiality and care for customer possessions.

Cash To You Bargain distinguishes itself through explicit transparency commitments and knowledgeable staff guidance. Customer testimonials highlight quick appraisals, fair offers, and professional handling of transactions. The company maintains a blog with educational content about pawn shop history and lending practices, suggesting an attempt to build trust through financial literacy. They operate with a clear call-to-action approach through phone contact (646-767-0541) and an online inquiry form.

As a pawn shop, this company serves customers in immediate need of cash who own valuable items, but the service comes with inherent limitations: borrowers must surrender collateral during the loan period, loan terms are time-limited, and failure to reclaim items results in loss of the collateral. The company's focus on jewelry and precious metals means it cannot serve customers without high-value items to pledge. Like all pawn operations, this is a short-term liquidity solution rather than a credit-building or sustainable debt management tool.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day or quick cash availability without credit checks, ideal for urgent financial needs
Reportedly fair appraisals and transparent processes according to customer testimonials
No credit impact—pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus or affect credit scores
Handles specialized high-value items (gold, diamonds, watches, rare coins) with stated expertise
No application fees or hidden charges typical of traditional lending
Educational blog content about pawn processes and financial topics demonstrates transparency commitment
Physical location in NYC provides in-person security and direct item evaluation
cons: Requires surrender of valuable collateral during entire loan period—creates risk of permanent loss if unable to repay
Limited to customers who own high-value items; excludes those without jewelry, watches, or precious metals
Pawn loans are short-term solutions with time limits; extending or renewing loans incurs additional fees
No credit-building benefit—does not help establish or repair credit history
Website contains minor spelling errors ('Dimonds' instead of 'Diamonds', 'watchs' instead of 'watches', 'Call Toady' instead of 'Call Today') suggesting potential quality control issues
best_for: Individuals with valuable jewelry, watches, or precious metals who need emergency cash within hours
People who want quick liquidity without credit checks or impact to credit scores
Customers seeking to sell high-value items quickly for cash without consignment delays
Those who prefer in-person transactions with physical verification of item value
diagnosis: Cash To You Bargain is best for individuals with valuable items (jewelry, watches, coins, diamonds) who need emergency cash immediately and can afford to pledge collateral for a short-term loan. The primary caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering your items and carry real risk of permanent loss if unable to repay within the loan term—this is a short-term liquidity tool, not a sustainable financial solution or credit-building option.
services: Pawn loans against gold jewelry and precious metals
Pawn loans against diamonds and diamond jewelry
Pawn loans against watches and timepieces
Pawn loans against gold coins and silver coins
Direct purchase of jewelry and precious metals
Direct purchase of coins (gold and silver)
Sale of pre-owned jewelry from inventory
Sale of pre-owned watches from inventory
Sale of pre-owned coins from inventory
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 41 W 47th St Booth 1 Window, New York, NY 10036
meta_description: NYC pawn shop offering quick loans, collateral lending, and buying/selling jewelry, watches, coins, and diamonds with fair appraisals.
